lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Yeah? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I need another assignment.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Before I assign you anything, I want to make something clear. My tasks have to be done in the Wilderness. Only kills inside the Wilderness will count.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: I don't check combat levels when choosing tasks, either. So even if other masters won't assign you 'tough' monsters, I'll pick anything for which you have the Slayer level, provided you can physically get to it.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: If you don't like my tasks, go and see Aya in Burthorpe, and ask her to assign you something else. She won't argue.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You might get a few unusual loot drops while you're on my assignments, if you're lucky. So, do you want me to assign you something?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Your new task is to kill [number] [monster].

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Got any tips for me?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You've got to do the task in the Wilderness.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Great, thanks!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, great!

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Good luck! Don't forget to come back when you need a new assignment.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No thanks, I don't want tasks from you.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You're still meant to be slaying [monster] in the Wilderness; you have [number] to go. Come back when you've finished your task.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You've already been assigned something.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster]; you have [number] to go. Come back when you've finished your task.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You're still hunting [monster], with [amount] to go.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: I don't think that's a suitable task for you. Shall I cancel it? This will not wipe your task streaks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, please cancel it.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Alright, consider the task cancelled. You can now get a new assignment when you want one.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, thanks, I want to try doing it.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Good luck with that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you any rewards for me, or anything to trade?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: I have quite a few rewards you can earn, and a wide variety of Slayer equipment for sale.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Let's talk about the difficulty of my assignments.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: All the Slayer Masters may currently assign you any task in our lists, regardless of your combat level.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Other Slayer Masters take your combat level into account when choosing tasks for you, so they won't set you anything too hard. But I don't do that - if you get a task from me, it could be anything for which you

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: have the Slayer level, provided you can physically get to it.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: What can you do apart from Slayer Master stuff?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Quite a lot! Those stupid guards think they've trapped me here for causing trouble, but I can get back out to the Wilderness for some fun anytime I like.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Well, normally, I can fix it so that you respawn in Edgeville whenever you die. However, I don't seem to be able to do so right now...

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Hey, perhaps you'd like me to fix it so that you respawn in Edgeville whenever you die. If you love the Wilderness as much as I do, you might enjoy that.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Tell me more.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Alright, here's the deal: Whenever you drop dead, I'll try to make you reappear in Edgeville, down by the southern ruins. You'll lose your items as normal.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: My magic won't affect you if you die in some fancy place like Castle Wars or the Emir's Arena; those places have their own magic trying to make you 'safe'.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: This will apply on members' worlds and non-members' worlds alike.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: I'll want a one-off payment of 5 million coins. If you get your respawn changed later, and then need me to set it back to Edgeville, I won't bill you again.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm not carrying that much money.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Scared of dropping it? Hah!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Okay, switch my spawn to Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That doesn't interest me.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Maybe you just can't handle Edgeville!

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: So do you want to respawn in Edgeville in future?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please switch my respawn back to Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Couldn't handle Ferox Enclave? Do you really think you could handle Edgeville?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, switch my respawn to Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Boring!

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Sounds like you're looking for some fun! Are you sure you can handle it?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, switch my respawn to Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, maybe another time.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Boring!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I don't want to respawn in Edgeville.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Boring!

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: So how's that Edgeville respawn working for you?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Please switch my respawn back to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: You really want to respawn in that dead-end slum? Are you sure? Come and see me if you want to respawn in Edgeville again; I won't ask for more money.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Yes, switch my respawn to Lumbridge.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Done.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: No, I'll keep the Edgeville respawn.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Good choice.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: It's fine, thanks.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I love the hat! Where did you get it from?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Thank you. I actually made it myself!

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh, I didn't know you enjoyed arts and crafts?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Oh yes, I put the craft in witchcraft! I have plenty of spare time outside of assigning tasks so I've been making comics and stuffed toys.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's so sweet! I didn't realise Slayer Masters had so much spare time.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Perhaps I have a little too much spare time! I've made so many things that I'm running out of room.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Have you thought about giving them to other people?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: I tried handing out stuffed chinchompas, but the guards mistook them for the real thing and arrested me for smuggling explosives out of my cell.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Oh dear. Don't you have any less... dangerous crafts?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Well, I do make hats too.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: That's perfect! People love hats.

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: Er... Nothing...

sections.title: Before the update Game Improvements (26 March 2020)

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Yeah? What do you want?

lines.speaker: Player
lines.text: I'm [player name]. I'm using my magic to communicate with you.

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Bizarre, go on, what do you want then?

lines.speaker: Krystilia
lines.text: Yeah? What do you want?
